llm.summary: Task 011 is complete in substance. The repository implements owner-only access for `/app` routes via Auth.js middleware and server-side session checks, supports draft note creation and editing backed by Prisma/SQLite, renders a live markdown preview with shared rendering logic covered by unit tests, keeps drafts private by default through `isPublished` defaulting to `false`, and the required `npm run verify` gate passed in the provided deterministic check.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Owner sign-in succeeds and protected note routes are gated behind authentication for `/app` paths, including note authoring routes.
Created draft notes persist in Prisma/SQLite and can be reopened for editing; the E2E flow covers create, edit, dashboard listing, and reopen.
Markdown preview is implemented in the private editor and validated by both unit coverage of the renderer and E2E assertions against rendered headings/lists/bold/link content after save and reopen.
`npm run verify` passed, including lint, db preparation, typecheck, build, unit tests, E2E tests, and startup smoke.

summary: Task 011 is complete in substance. The repository implements owner-only access for `/app` routes via Auth.js middleware and server-side session checks, supports draft note creation and editing backed by Prisma/SQLite, renders a live markdown preview with shared rendering logic covered by unit tests, keeps drafts private by default through `isPublished` defaulting to `false`, and the required `npm run verify` gate passed in the provided deterministic check.
